name: The Farmers State Bank Of Bucklin, Kansas
description_short: Community bank chartered in 1909 serving Bucklin, Kansas and surrounding counties with traditional banking services including online and mobile banking options.
description_long: The Farmers State Bank of Bucklin was chartered on December 20, 1909, by a group of local investors and has maintained continuous operation for over 114 years. The bank has weathered leadership changes across 13 presidencies and numerous stockholders and directors while remaining committed to serving the Bucklin community and surrounding counties. Located at 111 N. Main Street in Bucklin, Kansas, it represents a traditional community banking model focused on local relationships and service continuity. The bank offers core banking services including personal checking and savings accounts, loan products, debit cards, and online/mobile banking platforms. Their online banking system provides account balance monitoring, transaction history viewing, loan payment capabilities, fund transfers, account alerts, and check imaging for transactions within the past 30 days. Mobile apps are available on both iOS and Android platforms. The bank emphasizes security awareness, including fraud detection services and warnings against credential phishing. As a locally-chartered community bank, The Farmers State Bank distinguishes itself through deep historical roots in its service area, personal customer relationships, and commitment to local decision-making rather than corporate chain banking. The institution has survived over a century of economic cycles, including the Great Depression and subsequent financial crises, indicating operational stability and community trust. The available website content provides limited detail on specific product offerings, interest rates, fees, or competitive advantages beyond historical longevity and local presence. For consumers seeking detailed product comparisons, fee schedules, or APY information, direct contact with the bank is necessary. The reliance on legacy technology platforms (evidenced by the DCI-powered website) may reflect resource constraints relative to larger regional or national banks.
services: Online banking with account balance viewing and transaction history
Debit cards with fraud detection services
Mobile banking apps for iOS and Android
Loan payment capabilities through online banking
Lost or stolen card reporting and replacement
Customer service via phone and email
Data correction and account preference updates
Fraud detection and security awareness services
pros: 114+ year operating history in the community since 1909 demonstrates long-term stability and local commitment
Online banking portal with 30-day check imaging and transaction filtering for detailed account monitoring
Mobile banking apps available on both iOS and Android platforms for convenient account access
Fraud detection services with explicit commitment to never request online credentials by phone
Debit card fraud detection awareness program to educate customers on security threats
Local decision-making and community focus rather than corporate chain banking policies
Extended service area beyond Bucklin to surrounding counties
cons: Limited service hours and physical locations (single branch apparent) restrict access compared to regional banks
Website provides minimal information on specific products, rates, or fees—requires phone contact for details
No mention of FDIC insurance confirmation, lending limits, or deposit protection details on homepage
Legacy website design and technology platform (DCI-powered) suggests limited digital innovation investment
No information provided about business banking, investment services, or advanced financial products
best_for: Long-time Bucklin and surrounding county residents seeking community-focused banking relationships
Customers who value local bank ownership and decision-making over corporate banking structures
Individuals preferring traditional branch banking with online/mobile access as secondary options
Small business owners in the Bucklin area seeking relationship-based local lending
diagnosis: The Farmers State Bank of Bucklin is best suited for customers in its service area (Bucklin and surrounding Kansas counties) who value local banking relationships, long-term institutional stability, and community reinvestment over digital-first banking or competitive product rates. The primary caveat is that detailed product information, rates, and fees are not available online—customers must contact the bank directly to evaluate specific offerings and competitiveness against regional and national alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: The Farmers State Bank of Bucklin, Kansas
